name: RADIONUCLIDE CISTERNOGRAPHY
dominant_finding: image lumbar region immediately after injection to ensure subarachnoid injection
distribution: activity in basal cistern by 2-4 hours
discriminating_features: image lumbar region immediately after injection to ensure subarachnoid injection
activity in basal cistern by 2-4 hours
no / minimal lateral ventricular activity (may be transient in older patients)

general: image lumbar region immediately after injection to ensure subarachnoid injection
activity in basal cistern by 2-4 hours
no / minimal lateral ventricular activity (may be transient in older patients)
